_comment: Capability registry — the single source of which model serves each capability. `capabilities` maps a capability to its default model key. Each model entry: backend (module in providers/backends/), slug (host model id), match (substrings that map a raw env slug to this entry, so pinned '<slug>:<hash>' still resolves), capabilities it can serve, and its capability profile (what the model supports — runners validate against this, backends use it to build the input schema). Adding a model = one entry here (+ a backend module only if it lives on a new host). Override per capability with BACKLOT_<CAPABILITY>_MODEL / _PROVIDER env vars (dots become underscores).

profile.notes: stricter content moderation than 1-pro; audio is opt-in per clip
placeholder silence — real audio backends (ElevenLabs) arrive in P3
